zh.West Hall, High Legh, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾希 萊
zh.of Marston,Cheshire,England: 英國英格蘭爾馬爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Margery de Hatton於1130年之前出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，她的父親Robert de Hatton34歲，母親Eleanor Crispin30歲。她於1135年與Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1190年在英國英格蘭爾金德頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Margery de Hatton于1130年之前出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，她的父亲Robert de Hatton34岁，母亲Eleanor Crispin30岁。她于1135年与Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton在英国爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1190年在英国英格兰爾金德頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Hatten
meanings: English: variant of   Hatton  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
North German: habitational name from the name of an area of marshland between Oldenburg and Bremen.

variants.name: Hattan
meanings: English and Scottish (Argyll): variant of   Hatton  .

variants.name: Aton
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Heath
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Margery de Hatton was born before 1130, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Hatton, was 34 and her mother, Eleanor Crispin, was 30. She married Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton in 1135, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1190, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Margery de Hatton est née avant 1130, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Hatton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Crispin, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton en 1135, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.West Hall, High Legh, Cheshire, England: High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Margery de Hatton vor 1130 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Hatton 34 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Crispin 30. Sie hat 1135 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1190 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton nel 1135, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Margery de Hattonが1130年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Robert de Hattonは34歳，母Eleanor Crispinは30歳であった。1135年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでGilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kindertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1190年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Margery de Hatton(이)가 1130년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Hatton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Crispin(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1135년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Margery de Hatton nasceu antes 1130, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Hatton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Crispin, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton em 1135, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Margery de Hatton родилась перед 1130 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Hatton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Crispin, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton в 1135 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
